summary: feat(fxa-settings): implement React pairing pages with fullProdRollout and E2E tests
description:
- Convert all Pair/* pages to React (AuthAllow, AuthComplete, AuthTotp,
  AuthWaitForSupp, Index, Supp, SuppAllow, Unsupported)
- Add PairingAuthorityIntegration and PairingSupplicantIntegration models
- Add pairing WebChannel commands to firefox.ts channel layer
- Add PairingChannelClient for WebSocket communication
- Set fullProdRollout: true for pairRoutes in content-server routing
- Add parameterized desktop E2E tests (React + Backbone variants)
- Add iOS Simulator E2E test (Marionette authority + XCUITest supplicant)
- Add failure detection and authority completion verification in tests
